summary: Comprehensive testing of MoneyInsights Finance Tracker MVP completed. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all pages loading correctly and interactive features working. PDF parsing tested with multiple bank statement formats (Slice Credit, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank with password).

issues: Duplicate categories visible in the grid (e.g., Salary appears 3 times, Food & Dining appears twice) - likely due to multiple POST /api/init calls creating duplicate default categories

passed_tests: DELETE /api/categories - Cannot delete default category (400 error)
POST /api/debug-pdf - Slice credit card PDF parsing (no password)
POST /api/debug-pdf - HDFC bank statement PDF parsing (no password)
POST /api/debug-pdf - Axis bank PDF parsing (password: SANK3011)
POST /api/upload-statement - Upload PDF and import transactions
Dashboard page loads with summary cards
Accounts page loads with account list
Transactions page loads with transaction list
Categories page loads with default categories
Upload page loads with file input and account selector
Analytics page loads with charts and period selector
action_items: Consider adding idempotency check in POST /api/init to prevent duplicate default categories on multiple calls
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/init endpoint creates duplicate categories if called multiple times - should check for existing categories by name before inserting
test_credentials: No authentication required for this MVP
seed_data_creation: Test accounts and transactions created during testing are cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. PDF parsing works with multiple bank formats (Slice Credit, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank). Parser Builder auto-detection working. Test PDFs available at /tmp/test_pdfs/. The duplicate categories issue is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality.
